description_long: This is a cylindrical cup with a smooth, light gray exterior and a glossy red handle. The rim and inner edge of the cup are also accented in red, providing a striking contrast to the main body. One side of the cup features a bold, dark graphic artwork depicting armored figures, adding a decorative and thematic element. The handle is robust and ergonomically shaped, making it easy to grip. The cup appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain, with a high-gloss finish that reflects light. Its size and proportions suggest it is suitable for serving hot beverages such as coffee or tea.
description: A light gray cylindrical cup with a glossy red handle and rim, featuring a bold graphic artwork of armored figures on one side.
description_view_0: The cup is shown with its red handle on the right and the graphic artwork of armored figures prominently visible on the left side.
description_view_1: The cup is viewed directly from the back, showing only the red handle and the plain gray surface with no artwork visible.
description_view_2: The cup is seen from the side opposite the handle, displaying a mostly plain gray surface with a hint of the artwork and red accent visible at the edge.
description_view_3: The cup is shown from the front, with the graphic artwork of armored figures taking center stage and the red rim visible along the top edge.
